content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 26, 2026, focused on refining the core runtime architecture by removing provider-specific Qwen references and standardizing model-neutral terminology across the codebase.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Core Runtime Standardization
*   Removed Qwen-specific runtime comments and replaced them with provider-neutral wording (GLM/Gemma-class).
*   Updated local trajectory recorder fixtures to align with current Eliza/Gemma local tier standards.
*   Relevant PR: [#9753](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9753)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
